headline: BR Q1 Deep Dive: Delays in Large Sales and Investment Cycle Shape Near-Term Outlook
summary: Financial technology provider Broadridge (NYSE:BR) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 7.8% year on year to $1.95 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.72 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
